entry.title: puffin
entry.summary: Following Beginners Guide to Machine Learning in JavaScript step by step. using ImageNet (and MobileNet) for image classification. ml5 forces you to start with errors i had to use relative path so it works both locally (root) and online (folder play)

entry.title: camera
entry.summary: Following Beginners Guide to Machine Learning in JavaScript step by step, using ImageNet (and MobileNet) for image classification.

entry.title: loops
entry.content:
<script>
	function setup() {
		createCanvas(windowWidth, windowHeight);
	}
	function draw() {
		background(1, 75, 100);
		// circle properties
		fill(237, 34, 93);
		noStroke();
		var diameter = 40;

		// circle 
	
		for (var i = 0; i < width / diameter; i = i+1) {
			for (var j = 0; j < height / diameter; j=j+1) {
							ellipse(i * diameter + diameter / 2,
							j * diameter + diameter / 2, diameter, diameter);

			}
		}
	}
</script>
entry.summary: function setup() { createCanvas(windowWidth, windowHeight); } function draw() { background(1, 75, 100); // circle properties fill(237, 34, 93); noStroke(); var diameter = 40;

entry.title: loop
entry.content:
<script>
function setup() {
  createCanvas(windowWidth, windowHeight)
}

function draw() {
  background(1,75,100)
  fill(random(237, 207), random(34, 4), random(93, 63))
  noStroke()
  var diameter = 100
  var range = 20

  for (var i = 0;i <= width / diameter;i = i + 1) {
  	ellipse(i * diameter, 100, random(diameter, diameter - range), random(diameter, diameter - range))
  }
}

</script>

entry.title: stars
entry.content: In this card I write the main object (the stars) as a jekyll include. This way other cards can also use it too.
entry.summary: In this card I write the main object (the stars) as a jekyll include. This way other cards can also use it too. function setup() { createCanvas(windowWidth, windowHeight) console.log('The faculty of 5 is 1*2*3*4*5 = ' + faculty(5)) } function faculty(theValue) { var result = 1 for (var i = 1; i <= theValue; i++) { result = result * i } return result }

entry.title: lynda
entry.content:
<script>
var num;
		function setup() {
			num = 2;
			createCanvas(windowWidth, windowHeight);
			textAlign(CENTER, CENTER);

		}

		function draw() {
			var value;
			background(220);
			fill(237, 34, 93);

			textSize(100);
			if (num === 1) {
				fill(0, 150, 0);
value = 'TRUE';
			} else {

value = 'FALSE';
			}
			text(value, width/2, height/2);
		}

	</script>
entry.summary: var num; function setup() { num = 2; createCanvas(windowWidth, windowHeight); textAlign(CENTER, CENTER);

entry.title: alien
json
entry.content:
<script>
var fontSize = 35 var margin = 250 var lineBase = 150 var month = months.months
function preload(){ months = loadJSON('assets/data/more/months.json') }
function setup() { createCanvas(windowWidth, windowHeight) }
function draw() { background(180) fill(255) strokeWeight(1) ellipse(60, 60, 100, 100) push() rotate(30) angleMode(DEGREES) rect(60, 60, 100, 20) pop() fill(0) textSize(25) textFont("RenoMono") textSize(fontSize * .7)
stroke(120) for (var i = 0; i <= 20; i++) { line(100, lineBase, (i*10) + lineBase, lineBase * 2) line(lineBase *2, lineBase, (i*10) + lineBase, lineBase * 2) } for (var i = 0; i < months.months.length; i++) { text(months.months[i].name, random(margin, margin+5), fontSize * (i+1)) } }
</script>

entry.title: languages
entry.content:
<script>
		var data
			function preload(){
			data = loadJSON('/assets/data/more/languages.json')
		}
function setup() {
   noCanvas()
  var language = data.languages
for (var i = 0; i < language.length; i++) {
	createElement('h1', language[i].name)
}
}

function draw() {
  background(100)
}

</script>
entry.summary: var data function preload(){ data = loadJSON('/assets/data/more/languages.json') } function setup() { noCanvas() var language = data.languages for (var i = 0; i < language.length; i++) { createElement('h1', language[i].name) } }

entry.title: accelerometer
entry.content: This experiment uses accelerometer so it needs your permission
entry.summary: This experiment uses accelerometer so it needs your permission Allow request
